CREATE TABLE Locations (id INT PRIMARY KEY, latitude FLOAT, longitude FLOAT);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (1, -90, 0);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (2, 90, 0);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (3, 0, 0);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (4, 0, 180);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (5, -45, 45);
INSERT INTO Locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (6, 45, -45);
SELECT haversine_deg_km(Locations.latitude, Locations.longitude, 0, 0) FROM Locations WHERE id = 1;
SELECT haversine_deg_km(0, 0, 0, 180) AS distance, (SELECT haversine_deg_km(latitude, longitude, 0, 180) FROM Locations WHERE id = 3) AS temp;
SELECT a.id, haversine_deg_km(a.latitude, a.longitude, b.latitude, b.longitude) AS distance FROM Locations a, Locations b WHERE a.id != b.id;
SELECT a.id, b.id, haversine_deg_km(a.latitude, a.longitude, b.latitude, b.longitude) AS distance FROM Locations a JOIN Locations b ON a.id < b.id;
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Locations WHERE haversine_deg_km(latitude, longitude, -90, 0) < 10000);
